ddls:
CREATE TABLE "frame_sizes" (
  "frame_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frame size */,
  "frame_size_name" TEXT /* Name of the frame size (e.g., X-Small, Small) */,
  "height_in_inches" TEXT /* Height range in inches for the frame size */,
  "height_in_cm" TEXT /* Height range in centimeters for the frame size */,
  "inseam_in_inches" TEXT /* Inseam range in inches for the frame size */,
  "inseam_in_cm" TEXT /* Inseam range in centimeters for the frame size */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the frame size */,
  "min_rider_height_in_inches" REAL /* Minimum rider height in inches for this frame size */,
  "max_rider_height_in_inches" REAL /* Maximum rider height in inches for this frame size */,
  "min_rider_height_in_cm" REAL /* Minimum rider height in centimeters for this frame size */,
  "max_rider_height_in_cm" REAL /* Maximum rider height in centimeters for this frame size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frame_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bicycle_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bicycle model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the bicycle model */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the bicycle */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of bicycle (e.g., road, mountain, hybrid) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bicycle model */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the bicycle */,
  "wheel_size" TEXT /* Size of the wheels used in the bicycle model */,
  "gearing_type" TEXT /* Type of gearing used in the bicycle model */,
  "brake_type" TEXT /* Type of brake used in the bicycle model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bicycle_models_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES bicycle_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bicycle_models_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_website" TEXT /* Website of the brand */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the brand */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the brand's headquarters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bicycle_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the bicycle type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the bicycle type */,
  "sub_type" TEXT /* Sub-type of the bicycle type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frame_materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the frame material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frame material */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the frame material */,
  "durability" INTEGER /* Durability rating of the frame material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frame_colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the frame color */,
  "hex_code" TEXT /* Hex code of the frame color */,
  "rgb_value" TEXT /* RGB value of the frame color */,
  "pantone_value" TEXT /* Pantone value of the frame color */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_frame_sizes" (
  "model_frame_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model-frame combination */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bicycle model */,
  "frame_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame size */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame material */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame color */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the bicycle */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Stock quantity of the bicycle */,
  "recommended_rider_weight" TEXT /* Recommended weight range of riders for this frame size */,
  "production_year" INTEGER /* Year this frame size was first produced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_frame_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_frame_sizes_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_id") REFERENCES frame_colors ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_frame_sizes_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES bicycle_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_frame_sizes_frame_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_size_id") REFERENCES frame_sizes ("frame_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_frame_sizes_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES frame_materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information for the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "height_in_inches" REAL /* Height of the customer in inches */,
  "height_in_cm" REAL /* Height of the customer in centimeters */,
  "inseam_in_inches" REAL /* Inseam of the customer in inches */,
  "inseam_in_cm" REAL /* Inseam of the customer in centimeters */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the customer */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to take the measurements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date the employee completed training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_employees_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the store */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the store */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the store */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the store */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the store */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the store */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date the store opened */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "frame_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended frame size */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended bicycle model */,
  "recommended_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who made the recommendation */,
  "recommendation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for a follow-up appointment or check-in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES bicycle_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES store_employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_frame_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_size_id") REFERENCES frame_sizes ("frame_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the order was placed */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "model_frame_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model-frame combination */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the item */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the bicycle */,
  "warranty_expiration" TEXT /* Expiration date of the bicycle's warranty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_model_frame_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_frame_id") REFERENCES model_frame_sizes ("model_frame_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the user profile was last updated */,
  "login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of times the user has attempted to log in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
